MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Andy Westley, Clerk: Felicia Green, Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Magali Echeverria, authorized agent, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation.
Attorney, Francisco Torres representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Maurice Cottle is present.
Attorney, Andy Cho representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the AUG-03-2009 trial date remains set.
